chunks.title: The Ark's Journey and Delay
chunks.reason: Narrative of the first attempt to move the ark, Uzzah's death, and the temporary stay at Obed-edom's house.

chunks.title: The Ark Enters Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Description of the successful procession, David's dancing, and the distribution of food to the people.

chunks.title: David and Michal Confronted
chunks.reason: Dialogue between David and Michal regarding his celebration followed by the narrative conclusion of her childlessness.
